name: Axial Retailing Inc.
summary: Axial Retailing Inc. operates a chain of supermarkets in Japan. It operates a network of 129 stores. The company was formerly known as Harashin Narus Holdings Co Ltd. and changed its name to Axial Retailing Inc. in October 2013. Axial Retailing Inc. was incorporated in 1967 and is headquartered in Nagaoka, Japan.
